reason_for_decision: The article now compares fixed and mobile deployment as distinct operating models with enough engineering and workflow depth to pass.
strengths: It treats deployment model as a system decision instead of a packaging choice.
The access, logistics, and validation sections improve real-world decision value.
The brand-led section has been removed entirely.
summary_assessment: This version passes under the stricter rubric. It is now practical, balanced, and strong enough for procurement-facing knowledge content.
